title: gigachilon polonicum subsp. dicoccum
intro: Gigachilon polonicum subsp. dicoccum, also known as spelt, is an ancient cultivated wheat species that is a hexaploid of the Triticeae tribe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of spelt include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and providing essential nutrients such as iron and fiber. Spelt can be prepared as herbal tea, flour, or supplement, making it a versatile and accessible addition to a healthy diet.
